text: F1 visa rejected in Mumbai. VO: Why this university? VO: Who is paying? VO: Anyone in the U.S.? I said my brother is on H1B. He typed for 20 seconds and refused me under 214(b). Interview was under 2 minutes.
My B1/B2 interview at the U.S. Embassy Manila was around 3 minutes. Officer asked about my work, income, and why I was visiting. She was neutral, typed silently, then said your visa is approved.
